summary: Phase 11 Final Fix - Resolved CORS and connection issues between Desktop and Core

corsOriginMismatch.description: Desktop at localhost:3011 trying to reach Core at 127.0.0.1:3010 - browser treats as cross-origin
corsOriginMismatch.evidence: CORS errors in browser console, connection status showing Disconnected

inconsistentUrls.description: ServicePanel using 'localhost', Store using '127.0.0.1' - inconsistent connection attempts

corsRegexSupport.description: CORS config didn't support regex patterns for dynamic localhost ports
corsRegexSupport.evidence: CORS middleware only checked string equality

corsConfig.change: Added regex patterns to allow all localhost/127.0.0.1 origins

corsMiddleware.change: Updated CORS middleware to handle regex origins and added proper OPTIONS handling
corsMiddleware.after: Dynamic origin function with regex support, explicit methods/headers

servicePanel.change: Updated to use consistent localhost URLs, removed self-reference (Jarvis Desktop from services list)
servicePanel.before: Mixed localhost usage, included self in service checks
servicePanel.after: Consistent localhost:3010 for Core, localhost:3002 for MC, localhost:18789 for Gateway

connectionFlow.step2: Store initializes and checks Core at localhost:3010/health
connectionFlow.step6: ServicePanel shows Jarvis Core as online
connectionFlow.expectedResult: All green - Desktop connected to Core
